name: chat-axory
description: Monorepo wrapper for Chat BullQ web, API and MCP services.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix chat-bullq-api-main install && npm --prefix chat-bullq-web-main install && npm --prefix chat-bullq-mcp-main install
scripts.build: npm --prefix chat-bullq-api-main run build && npm --prefix chat-bullq-web-main run build && npm --prefix chat-bullq-mcp-main run build
